data.name: Erocism
data.detailed_description:
📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌




關於此遊戲


[劇情]
主角偶然得到了一本封印了驅魔者的書，
他無意中打開了這本書，被吸入其中。為了驅除書中的附身靈魂，
主角必須用自己的能量淨化它們？ ！


[遊戲玩法]
*遊戲目標
完成總共12個謎題關卡，獲得插畫獎勵
遊戲共包含12個關卡，6個常規關卡和6個隱藏關卡。
※隱藏關卡進入方法
完成常規關卡後，關卡旁邊會出現一個EROCISM按鈕。
1. 按下EROCISM按鈕，現有關卡片名稱將會變更為隱藏關卡名稱。
之後，點擊關卡即可進入隱藏關卡。
（隱藏關卡中也有隱藏的彩蛋。）
2. 當你點擊畫廊中鎖定的場景時，進入舞臺。


*通關方法
在限定回合數內獲得所有出現的線索道具
（體力耗盡則失敗。
被出現的幽靈抓住則被擊敗。 ）


*操作
基本上在進入關卡前使用滑鼠操作。


*角色移動
基本使用方向鍵或WASD操作。
（可在設定中變更移動鍵。）


[遊戲特色]
*故事中有6位女性角色。
*解決與每個角色對應的謎題可獲得獨特的插圖。

data.short_description: 為了驅除她們身上的鬼魂，必須用主角的能量來淨化她們。 請尋找線索，幫助她們驅除體內的鬼魂！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Erocism
data.detailed_description:
📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌



📌look at this Games📌




About the Game


[Story]
The protagonist, who obtained a book that sealed those who deemed exorcism impossible by chance,
unknowingly opens the book and gets sucked into it. To exorcise the possessed spirits inside the book,
the protagonist must purify them with their own energy?!


[How to play the game]
*Game Goals
Clear a total of 12 puzzle stages to earn illustration rewards
It consists of a total of 12 stages, 6 regular stages and 6 hidden stages.

※How to enter the hidden stage
When you clear a normal stage, an EROCISM button will appear next to the stage.
1. If you press the EROCISM button, the existing stage name changes to the hidden stage name.
After this, click on the stage to enter the hidden stage.
(There are also hidden Easter eggs in the hidden stage.)
2. When you click on the locked scene in the gallery, go to the stage.


*How to clear
Get all the clue items presented within the limit number of turns
(If you lose all of your stamina, you lose.
If you are caught by a ghost that appears, you will be defeated.)


*Control
Basically, you use the mouse to operate before entering the stage.


*Character Movement
Basically, it is operated using the arrow keys or WASD.
(You can change the movement keys in settings.)


[Game characteristics]
* There are six female characters in the story.
* Solving puzzles corresponding to each character yields peculiar illustrations.

data.short_description: In order to exorcise them full of vagina, they have to be purified with the main character's energy. Please find clues to help drive out the ghosts from their bodies!
data.supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:
  • OS *: Window7 SP1/WIN8/WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
